purpose: Let the public CLI install and operate as the public control plane while entitled high-quality PPT generation stays in a private repository, private package, or private gateway.
public_repo_role: configure private repository or gateway connectivity
install or update the private runtime package into a local workspace-controlled path
invoke the private CLI build entrypoint without exposing private source, templates, binaries, secrets, or work logs
private_repo_or_gateway_role: own private template binaries and design DNA
own premium assets and materialization policy
own real activation counters, revocation, rotation, user audit, and daily quota
own signed private package or gateway response generation

private_package_install.expected_user_value: install or update the private runtime package needed for production-quality PPT generation
real_execution_requires: private package repository or signed package endpoint
GitHub CLI auth or operator-managed package credentials
no raw secret in committed files

private_template_library_build.expected_user_value: full template-library based high-quality PPT generation
real_execution_requires: private runtime package installed or private gateway endpoint configured
private build command configured by package, environment, or operator
no raw secret in committed files

configuration.credential_policy: Use OS keychain, GitHub CLI auth, or external operator-managed secret stores only. Never commit or print tokens.

blockers_for_real_execution: private package repository or signed package endpoint not configured for the operator
private runtime build command not installed or configured
real external user activation and quota system not deployed beyond invite-beta fixtures
legal/product approval for invite-beta private package distribution still required
validation_expectations: public connector status works without secrets
private package install dry run writes local summary only
private build dry run writes local summary only
raw workspace codes and tokens never appear in connector reports
CLI build execution is blocked unless a private build command is configured
private build execution can return dual-output artifact paths and validation summaries without exposing private absolute paths
Auto and Assistant operating modes are passed through as request metadata with distinct approval expectations
clean export includes connector code and contract but no private assets
